message:
feat: enrich triage with quick-fix suggestions + explainability

Each triage item now includes:
- actions: array of {command, label} for multiple suggested commands
- explain: link to wa why for detection/decision explainability
- Progressive disclosure: --verbose shows all actions + explain link

Section-specific suggestions:
- health: wa doctor + wa doctor --json
- crashes: wa reproduce + wa doctor; explain links to bundle path
- events: wa events + wa why --recent + wa show; explain links to wa why
- workflows: wa workflow status + wa why + wa show

6 new tests covering actions/explain contract, section-to-action mapping,
explain field presence, and primary action consistency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
